original_statement: what is the shortest number of points this team won by during this season?
mutated_statement: what is the shortest number of points this group won by during this period and at the same time must also be the longest number of points they won by?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Time generalization + Added contradictory constraint: "this team" → "this group" (this team→this group) | "this season" → "this period" (this season→this period) | addition of "and at the same time must also be the longest number of points they won by?" (adds requirement that the shortest margin must equal the longest margin → logical contradiction)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对预测答案“1|7”的说明（明确列出最小获胜差为1、最大为7且认为答案正确），可识别出关键信息：代理计算并返回了最小和最大值但未提及变异问题中要求“最短同时也是最长”的自相矛盾。具体表现为：按常规模块化查询与解释（simple_query 得到“1|7”），没有指出矛盾、未请求澄清也未尝试修正。因而归入“无法意识到指令矛盾”——代理机械执行并给出结果，语义冲突未被识别或处理。
